Package org.eventb.ui.prover

Interface ITacticProvider

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractHypGoalTacticProvider, AbstrExpr, AddHypothesis, AndOrDist, Arith, AutoProver, BCompDef, CardComparisonGoal, CardDef, CardUpTo, CompImg, CompUnionDist, ConjunctionElimination, ConjunctionIntroduction, ContImpHyp, Contradict, Conv, Deduction, DefaultTacticProvider, DisjToImpl, DisjunctionElimination, DoCase, DomComp, DomDistLeft, DomDistRight, DomRanUnionDist, DoubleImplHyp, DTDistinctCase, DTInduction, EqualCard, EqualFunImgDef.AbstractTacticProvider, EqualFunImgDef.Left, EqualFunImgDef.Right, Equality1, Eqv, EqvLR, EqvRL, ExistsInstantiationGoal, ExistsInstantiationHyp, ExponentiationStep, FiniteCompsetGoal, FiniteDef, FiniteDomGoal, FiniteFunConvGoal, FiniteFunctionGoal, FiniteFunDomGoal, FiniteFunRanGoal, FiniteFunRelImgGoal, FiniteInterGoal, FiniteMaxGoal, FiniteMinGoal, FiniteNegativeGoal, FinitePositiveGoal, FiniteRanGoal, FiniteRelationGoal, FiniteRelImgGoal, FiniteSetGoal, FiniteSetMinusGoal, FiniteUnionGoal, ForallInstantiationGoal, ForallInstantiationHyp, ForallmpD, ForallmtD, FunCompImg, FunImgSimp, FunInterImg, FunOvr, FunSetMinusImg, FunSingletonImg, He, ImpAnd, ImpCaseProvider, ImplicationElimination1, ImpOr, InclusionSetMinus, InclusionSetMinusLeft, InclusionSetMinusRight, Lasoo, LocalEqRewriteProvider, MinMaxDef, ModusTollens, PartitionRewrites, PostTactic, PPTacticProvider, PPTacticProviderRestricted, PPTacticProviderWithLasso, RanComp, RanDistLeft, RanDistRight, RelImgUnionLeft, RelImgUnionRight, RelOvr, RemoveInclusion, RemoveInclusionUniversal, RemoveMembership, RemoveNegation, RemoveStrictInclusion, SetEql, SetMinus, TotalDomainSubstitution, UnionInterDist
public interface ITacticProvider
This is the common interface to provide tactics to the proving user interface.
Since:
1.1

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<ITacticApplication>
    getPossibleApplications(IProofTreeNode node, Predicate hyp, String globalInput)
    Returns a list of tactic applications according to the given arguments.

  • Method Details

    • getPossibleApplications

      List<ITacticApplication> getPossibleApplications(IProofTreeNode node, Predicate hyp, String globalInput)
      Returns a list of tactic applications according to the given arguments.

      The returned list of tactic applications may be empty if the tactic is not applicable, but NEVER null. When the tactic is applicable, the size of the returned list may be:

      • one or more for a local tactic (with target goal or hypothesis or any)
      • exactly one for a global tactic (with target global)
      Tactic providers that fail to respect these rules will be ignored.

      Parameters:
      node - the current proof tree node
      hyp - the hypothesis or null if the goal is in consideration
      globalInput - the input for the tactic (taken from the input text in the Proof Control View) in case of global tactic
      Returns:
      a (possibly empty) list of tactic applications; never null
      Since:
      2.0
